description: Mock e-Residency application: a first-time applicant, a fictional software developer from a country not subject to the citizenship-based application restrictions, applying to found and remotely manage an Estonian OU. No Estonian personal identification code (first-time applicant), a full contact address, all background-disclosure declarations answered (three required 'no' declarations, several optional disclosures left absent as genuinely not applicable), and a PBGB service office selected for pick-up. Fabricated details, not a real person.

data.purposeAndJustification: I am a freelance software developer working remotely for clients across the EU. I intend to establish and manage an Estonian OU to invoice clients and pay Estonian taxes on that company's income, and to digitally sign contracts and official filings without needing to travel to Estonia in person.
